question: Based on this plot of best-performing advertising channels, what conclusion about the overall campaign performance is most justified?

options.A: The campaign is very effective on every channel, since all channels shown respond strongly to increased spend.
options.B: The campaign is ineffective overall because only a few points show improvement.
options.C: The campaign appears effective on these channels, but we cannot assess performance across all channels from this plot alone.
options.D: The campaign harms performance because higher advertising spend consistently reduces sales in these channels.

explanation: The chart excludes channels where spend may not convert as well, so it overstates how broadly the campaign succeeds.
